---
title: "05 The Truth The Whole Truth And Nothing But"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
# R setup for all chapters (edit as needed)
knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)
source(here::here("R/functions/main-functions.R"))
```

# Section Heading

Introductory or overview text goes here. Replace this with your chapter introduction.

![Image description](/assets/images/day-XX/example.jpg){.lightbox}  # Example image (update path as needed)

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="85%"}
Main content goes here. Use headings, lists, and paragraphs as needed.
:::
::: {.column width="15%"}
<div style="margin-top: 10px">
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
create_clock(HH, MM)  # Replace HH, MM with hour and minute
```
</div>
:::
::::

<div class=workbook_callout>Workbook or activity callout here. (Optional)</div>
<div class=neave_note>Optional Neave note or commentary.</div>

<!--
FOOTNOTES (if needed)
-->

[^a]: Example footnote. Replace or remove as needed.
